vehicle: BMW E65 730li 2007 GCC spec (N52B30 engine, ZF 6HP19 transmission)
notes: Service intervals for E65 730li in GCC conditions. BMW recommends Condition-Based Service (CBS). GCC heat means shorter intervals than European spec — items marked [GCC] reflect this.

schedule.parts: BMW LL-01 specification 5W-30 fully synthetic (7 litres) + OEM oil filter element + drain plug crush washer
schedule.notes: GCC heat degrades oil faster. Use Castrol Edge LL-01 or BMW TwinPower. Reset CBS oil counter via ISTA or by holding trip reset with key in II position.

schedule.parts: Mahle/Mann cabin filter pair (E65 has 2 elements)
schedule.notes: GCC dust shortens life. Black activated-carbon type best. Behind glovebox — pull cover, swap, replace cover.

schedule.parts: OEM Mann or Mahle panel filter
schedule.notes: GCC sandstorms shorten interval significantly. Inspect every oil change.
Use BMW LL-01 spec only. Gap 0.7mm pre-set. Torque to 23Nm.
Replace as a set with spark plugs. Aftermarket coils have known reliability issues — use OEM only.
Every 2 years regardless of mileage — brake fluid absorbs moisture. Bleed at all 4 corners using ISTA pump-bleed procedure for ABS/DSC.

schedule.parts: BMW Coolant blue (G48) concentrate 2L + 2L distilled water OR 4L pre-mix
schedule.notes: Every 4 years. BMW G48 blue ONLY — never mix with other coolants. Bleed via expansion tank bleed screw with engine warm.

schedule.parts: ZF Lifeguard 6 (8L) + ZF filter kit (includes pan + gasket)
schedule.notes: BMW says 'sealed for life' — IGNORE THIS. Lifetime fluid is a myth. Replace at 60-80k km. Must be done with trans at 40°C exactly for correct fill level — needs INPA/ISTA temperature reading.
Diff drain + fill plug accessible from below. Limited slip on some E65 variants needs different fluid.
Under car near fuel tank. Depressurize fuel system first (pull fuel pump fuse, crank engine until stalls).
Inspect at every oil change for cracks. Replace at 100k or if cracks visible. Failure = no power steering + no charging.

schedule.parts: Elring valve cover gasket + spark plug seals + breather hose
schedule.notes: Almost guaranteed to leak by 100k km on N52. Preventive replacement saves misfire issues.

schedule.parts: CCV oil separator + hoses + dipstick tube seal
schedule.notes: Replace before failure to avoid lean codes (P0171, P2187). Universal N52 wear item.

schedule.parts: Pierburg OEM electric water pump + Mahle thermostat
schedule.notes: Preventive replacement at 100-120k km. Failure = overheating in traffic. Use OEM Pierburg only — cheap aftermarket fail in months.

schedule.parts: Battery load test (or replace AGM 90Ah if failed)
schedule.notes: GCC heat = 5-7 year battery life. Annual load test recommended. If replacing, MUST register new battery to IBS via ISTA — otherwise alternator under-charges.

schedule.parts: R134a refrigerant + UV dye + cabin filter check
schedule.notes: Critical in GCC. Pressure test + recharge every 2 years. Check condenser for stone damage. Compressor clutch test.
